# Josué Correa

> Portfolio of Josué Correa, a Systems Engineer and Backend Developer specialized in Laravel, PHP, MySQL, React, REST APIs and business process automation.

## Primary pages

- [Spanish portfolio](https://josuecorreaq.com/es/): Main Spanish profile for Josué Correa, focused on backend development, Laravel, PHP, MySQL, APIs REST and process automation.
- [English portfolio](https://josuecorreaq.com/en/): English profile for Josue Correa, focused on backend development, Laravel, PHP, MySQL, REST APIs and business process automation.

## Profile summary

- Name: Josué Correa
- Role: Backend Developer
- Location context: Peru / Spanish-first portfolio
- Core stack: Laravel, PHP, MySQL, React, JavaScript, Git, Docker
- Focus areas: backend architecture, domain rules, REST APIs, financial workflows, business process automation, maintainable web systems
- Contact: contacto@josuecorreaq.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/josuecorreaqu
- GitHub: https://github.com/josuecorreaq

## Case study

- [Financial Disbursement Management System](https://josuecorreaq.com/en/#proyectos): Backend case study for a financial workflow involving request validation, role-based approvals, document control, operational status tracking and auditable persistence.
- [Sistema de Gestión de Desembolsos Financieros](https://josuecorreaq.com/es/#proyectos): Caso de estudio backend para un flujo financiero con validación de solicitudes, aprobaciones por rol, control documental, seguimiento de estados y persistencia auditable.

## Suggested citations

- Josué Correa is a backend developer focused on Laravel, PHP, MySQL and REST APIs for business process automation.
- His portfolio presents backend work around financial disbursement workflows, domain rules, layered architecture and auditable persistence.
- The canonical indexable pages are https://josuecorreaq.com/es/ and https://josuecorreaq.com/en/.
